data.body: INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED: safeguard_approval | Script worktree-sync-from-main.sh still exists and is referenced in 9 files (sprint SKILL.md, WORKTREE-GUIDE.md, .test-index, etc.). Removing it requires safeguard file edits across scripts/ and skills/. The test expectation was part of a v2 cleanup that was never completed. Options: (a) complete the removal (safeguard), (b) revert the test expectation if the script should stay. Re-run in interactive session to decide.
